LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.description: A massive, custom heavy weapon designed for maximum firepower and intimidation.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.label: chunky boi
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.description: The Light Machine Gun is a pre-war, fully automatic support weapon chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Designed for sustained suppressive fire, it features a high-capacity magazine and a high rate of fire, making it ideal for pinning down enemies and providing covering fire in open combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.label: light machine gun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.description: The Minigun is a multi-barrel, rotary machine gun capable of firing 5mm rounds at an extremely high rate. Its devastating firepower makes it a favorite for heavy support roles, but its weight and bulk limit mobility.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.label: minigun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.description: An early model Avenger heavy weapon, known for its high rate of fire and reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.label: MkI avenger
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.description: A powerful heavy weapon, designed for maximum suppression and area denial.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.label: vindicator
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.tools.0.label: barrel
